channel.title: JSX element type 'Button' does not have any construct or call signatures.ts when using ant.d
channel.description:
Hello,
im currently trying to use the antd components for my website, im working with TypeScript but i have the issue now that i can't use any antd components even though i have exported them properly.
The following error message is shown: ![Unbenannt|689x445](upload://sqZ7LXaT7oAh39oTWqjqzk3wrsq.jpeg)
I still couldn't find any solution after doing a lot of googling.

item.title: JSX element type 'Button' does not have any construct or call signatures.ts when using ant.d
item.dc:creator: gautier.blandin
item.description:
Have you found a workaround ? I’m having the same issue.

Read full topic
item.source: JSX element type 'Button' does not have any construct or call signatures.ts when using ant.d

item.title: JSX element type 'Button' does not have any construct or call signatures.ts when using ant.d
item.dc:creator: mburridge
item.description:
Hi @erhannnn

Take a look at this repo which uses antd components in a Frontity project.

Hope that helps and don’t hesitate to ask if you’re still having problems.

Read full topic
item.source: JSX element type 'Button' does not have any construct or call signatures.ts when using ant.d

Hello,

im currently trying to use the antd components for my website, im working with TypeScript but i have the issue now that i can’t use any antd components even though i have exported them properly.

I still couldn’t find any solution after doing a lot of googling.
